title: 🌐 Open Source Contributor at Servi
body: Developing the backend of a full-stack open-source project focused on promoting technological awareness. Building TechTipsWiki to explain technologies transparently.

title: 💻 R&D Member at Happy Hacking Space
body: After placing 2nd in the first-ever community Code Jam, I joined their R&D team to contribute to the hackerspace ecosystem.

title: 🤝 Head of Education Coordination at Milli Gençlik Topluluğu (AGD)
body: Co-founded this university club from just 2 members and grew it into the most active AGD branch in Ankara.
